backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types and persistent state for advertising registrations, user profiles, and technician data, with authorization mixins and a seeded list of Spanish film crew technicians.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Find Available Crew CTA, Tribe Availability enquiry form, and search results display) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key changes, serving as a build/planning reference for the AD TRIBE frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, primary, accent, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AD TRIBE app, loading Inter and Bebas Neue fonts from Google Fonts and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for landing, profile, dashboard, connections, registration, and registration success pages, with auth-guarded redirects.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Availab: Interactive monthly calendar component that allows toggling individual dates as available, operating on a plain array of Date objects with optional read-only mode.
Renders a legend with color-coded indicators for Available, Booked, and Unavailable calendar states.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation, login/logout via Internet Identity, and a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Locatio: Placeholder card for location profiles that redirects users to the registration flow.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Product: Placeholder card for production house profiles that redirects users to the registration flow.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Profess: Displays a read-only view of a professional's registration details (name, city, department, designation, experience) fetched from the backend, with a fallback to register if none exists.
frontend/src/components/profiles/VendorP: Placeholder card for vendor profiles that redirects users to the registration flow.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog component that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and creates their profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/registration/Inl: Multi-step professional registration form with department/designation selects and an interactive availability date picker calendar.
frontend/src/components/search/ProviderC: Card component displaying a provider's name, type, description, and up to four tags with an overflow count badge.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: Controlled text input with a search icon for querying providers by name or keyword.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchFil: Filter UI with a dropdown to select provider type (all, professional, vendor, location).
frontend/src/components/search/SearchRes: Displays search results or a skeleton loading state; currently shows an empty-state message as results are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/components/tribe/TribeAvail: Form for directors or production houses to search for available technicians by project details, shoot dates, city, and required roles.
Displays technician search results split into same-city and other-city sections, rendering each technician as a card with name, role, location, and contact number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend operations including fetching/saving user profiles, submitting professional registrations, retrieving verified members, and searching technicians.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that configures Tailwind and defines CSS custom properties for the AD TRIBE design system's light and dark color themes using forest green and saffron palettes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ConnectionsPage.tsx: Page that displays a list of verified AD TRIBE community members fetched from the backend, showing their principal IDs with a verified badge.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing a welcome message and navigation cards linking to the user's profile and the connections/tribe pages.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Main landing page for AD TRIBE featuring hero section, feature cards, stats, inline registration form, and a tribe availability search form restricted to authenticated directors and producers.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's AD TRIBE profile including account info and professional registration details, with loading skeletons and navigation to registration if needed.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationPage.tsx: Standalone registration page that renders the InlineRegistrationForm and redirects to the success page upon completion.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationSuccessPa: Success confirmation page shown after registration, with a welcome message and buttons to navigate to the dashboard or profile.
frontend/src/utils/dateHelpers.ts: Utility functions for converting between ICP nanosecond Time values and JavaScript Date objects, plus date formatting and date-range generation helpers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL query parameters from both standard query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the AD TRIBE design system including custom brand colors (saffron, forest, gold), display/body font families, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the AD TRIBE platform project state including version, feature summaries, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing implemented features for the film industry professional availability system.
